# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

This is a research preprint describing a concrete benchmark and reporting real measured results, including execution-based evaluation over 104 tasks and quantitative performance claims such as sub-40% average test pass rates for the strongest agents. It therefore clearly meets the institute bar for empirical substance.

## Limits
